app.title: Automate Excel with Python: From manual grind to one-click workflow
app.author: teleforce
proposed_tests: Read in an Excel file using Python script, write out modified file
Use Python script to automate multiple workflows for same Excel file
Compare execution times between script automation and manual workflows
